name: Postage
description: A sheet of stamps from nowhere in particular — tilted white squares, dashed frames and a single bold mark, re-franked on every redraw.

code.style: --frame: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --mark: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --tilt: @rand(-6deg, 6deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--color1); width: 84%; height: 84%; margin: 8%; transform: rotate(var(--tilt)); box-shadow: calc(14px / @Y) calc(18px / @Y) 0 rgba(60, 44, 20, 0.18); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 7%; border: calc(28px / @Y) dashed var(--frame); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(30%, 44%); left: 33%; top: 31%; border-radius: @p(50%, 0%, 50% 50% 0 0, 0 50% 50% 50%); background: var(--mark); transition: ease 600ms; } } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
